bird.name: Visayan shama
bird.summary: The Visayan shama (Copsychus superciliaris) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to Ticao, Masbate, Negros, and P…

locations.name: Mount Talinis
locations.summary: Mount Talinis is a complex volcano in the Philippine province of Negros Oriental.

relations.subject: Visayan shama
relations.evidence: It also occurs in the proposed Central Panay Mountain Range Park which contains the largest block of remaining forest in the Western Visayas, and the tourist destination of Twin Lakes (Mount Talinis)

relations.subject: Visayan shama
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Visayan shama

relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
